1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get national flood polygons for gjentaksintervall=200 (200-year) to reduce by municipality extent

3.description: get parcels in Drammen with stored area > 5000 m2

5.description: find parcels (from step 3) that intersect reduced 200-year flom polygons (from step 4)

6.description: collapse to one row per parcel and get parcel area (MIN of stored area) grouped by parcel id and identifier
